## Hypothesis

<!-- What do you expect to find, and why? -->

## Method

- **Agent configurations:** <!-- Which agents from benchmarks/agents/ or new ones? -->
- **Model(s):** <!-- Which model(s) and version(s)? -->
- **Task set:** <!-- Full 89 tasks, a subset, or a different benchmark? -->
- **Comparison arms:** <!-- What are you comparing against? -->
- **Number of trials:** <!-- k=1, k=5, etc. -->

## Cost Estimate

- **Estimated token cost:** <!-- e.g., ~$200 -->
- **Estimated wall-clock time:** <!-- e.g., 12-20 hours -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- What result would support the hypothesis? What result would refute it?
     Include specific score ranges or statistical thresholds if possible. -->

| Outcome | Interpretation |
|---------|---------------|
| | |
| | |

## What Failure Looks Like

<!-- The result that would weaken or invalidate the claim. Be specific. -->

## Relationship to Existing Experiments

<!-- Does this build on P1-P6 from the roadmap? Does it depend on another
     experiment's results? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information: relevant papers, prior art, infrastructure
     requirements. -->
